programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Iberia's Woodlands
programme.desc: Narrated by acclaimed English actor Bill Nighy, this blue-chip natural history series reveals the challenges faced by the astounding and rare creatures that make this unique environment their home.

programme.title: Iberia's Woodlands
programme.desc: Narrated by acclaimed English actor Bill Nighy, this blue-chip natural history series reveals the challenges faced by the astounding and rare creatures that make this unique environment their home.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Ungulate team prepare for a birth, we meet one of the longest living animals and Auckland Zoo helps to save an endangered giant.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Baby Giraffe meets the herd, the Zoo’s five otter brothers are on the move and the ectotherm team search for a hidden for a treasure.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, it's an anxious time for Zoo vets as they work to save one of the most endangered birds on the planet, and the ectotherm team are on a mission in the wild South Island.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Iceland: The Puffin Sanctuary
programme.desc: The endearing, "comical" puffin is Iceland's national emblem, but its fate is concerning. For a decade, couples have stopped breeding. A handful of local enthusiasts are now mobilized to save this beloved seabird.

programme.title: In the Giant Mammoth Tracks
programme.desc: The million-year-old, giant Durfort mammoth skeleton required urgent, world-first restoration. We follow the tricky process of disassembling and reassembling the fragile fossil. Through CGI and museum knowledge, the film brings this fascinating, little-known giant back to life.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s diverse landscapes host unique wildlife. From Cork Oak forests in the south to deciduous forests in the north, follow iconic species through key life phases, from mating to survival in the wild.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is heading out of Cape Town into the more quiet coastal area of the Western Cape, and the picturesque town of Paternoster. It’s here he’ll marvel at the seaside village feel and take an e-bike ride along the beach.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: As the final stanza in Warren’s Food Trail of South Africa, he’s back in the bush, a quintessential part of all travel to the rainbow nation.

programme.title: Taste of the Territory
programme.desc: Jimmy heads to the bustling Rapid Creek markets, mingling amongst the food stalls, produce growers, and locals out for their weekly shop.

programme.title: Taste of the Territory
programme.desc: Jimmy meets some of the Greek community preparing food for the Greek cultural festival; he visits the colourful Malak Night Market.

programme.title: Taste of the Territory
programme.desc: Jimmy explains why the Top End has some of the country's best and freshest seafood; Jimmy meets self-taught chef Rachael Ciesolka at a Darwin wharf, and learns how to cook her signature lemon citrus mud crab dish.

programme.title: Taste of the Territory
programme.desc: Jimmy travels to the remote Arnhem Land coastal community of Maningrida to get a taste of food out in the bush.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: Since the early 1990s, Quentin Tarantino has been on a cinematic rollercoaster ride, that’s never looked like slowing down, that has cemented himself as one of the worlds most influential filmmakers.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: Spike Lee has always been a controversial and political filmmaker whose films speak for themselves. Over 40 years since his debut in the world of film, Spike continues to push boundaries in America.

programme.title: Kamala Harris: The Next President
programme.desc: This documentary explores Kamala Harris's rise from her early life in California to becoming the first female Vice President of the United States, her impact on American politics, and her potential path to becoming the first female President.

programme.title: Denzel Washington: American Icon
programme.desc: This in-depth documentary explores the remarkable journey of Denzel Washington, a powerhouse actor who has redefined what it means to be a leading man in Hollywood.

programme.title: Morgan Freeman: His Incredible Story
programme.desc: Journey through the life of Morgan Freeman—his struggles, triumphs, and legendary voice that shaped Hollywood and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough, a legendary communicator and educator, has traveled the world for over six decades, inspiring millions with his captivating storytelling and bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Rafael Nadal: King of Clay
programme.desc: This documentary delves into the life of tennis legend Rafael Nadal, exploring his journey from a young prodigy to a global icon. Through triumphs and challenges, it reveals the dedication that defines Nadal’s legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Clint Eastwood: Make My Day
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood, Actor, director and philanthropist. From being the quintessential western icon, to honing his artistic skills and caring persona. This is his magnificent story.

programme.title: Mariah Carey: Grit and Glamour
programme.desc: A Cinderella story of sorts, Mariah Carey. Songbird Supreme. Queen of Christmas. Dedicated philanthropist. Mariah has sold over 220 million records and released the best-selling Christmas album ever.

programme.title: Kamala Harris: The Next President
programme.desc: This documentary explores Kamala Harris's rise from her early life in California to becoming the first female Vice President of the United States, her impact on American politics, and her potential path to becoming the first female President.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Dance Or Die
programme.desc: From underground clubs to global superstardom, Lady Gaga: Dance or Die explores the unstoppable rise of the pop icon who redefined music, fashion, and fame. Through triumphs and tribulations, witness how Gaga danced through life’s challenges — and won.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: A new leader of Voltron must be found before Lotor's forces attack.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Motato temps Larry to goof off on their new job at Pa Grape's store/Captain Mike and Mr. Pea compete to get Junior and Tiny Pea the best pet ever

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Madame Blueberry wins tickets to a concert and everyone wants to go with her/Junior, Laura, Callie, and Gary start a club but can't agree on anything

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the banana bread Harper leaves out for Eden is stolen, the Dew Drops create a sting operation to catch the thief. / When Captain Meow Meow gets a splinter in his paw and hears the word "vet," he flees. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. programme.desc: As the team prepare for their great hammerhead experience, Steve has one more dive he wants some of them to experience. programme.title: Deadly Mission Shark 1

programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: China News

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programme.title: Taken in Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a marinated vegetable-infused dish of tteokbokki, a popular Korean food made from rice cakes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: A mystery box challenge with a saucy twist. The cooks must use at least one of six Asian sauces to cook a showstopping dish, with the bottom four headed for tomorrow’s pressure test.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation’s affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: The K-GIM Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: With high expectations, the Dokbakz arrive in Australia, where nature and art coexist. After landing at Sydney Airport, they are eager to explore one of the city's most famous landmarks: the Opera House.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar thinks he hit a homerun with a zombie outside Tampa. As they start to renovate, it's discovered that this house will need a new roof, flooring and an industrial clean-out of the in-ground pool.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: MasterChef legend Daren Purchese returns with his toughest challenge yet. Darren’s exquisite Cherry Blossom dessert will push the novice cooks to their limits as they try to replicate it in four hours.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: This lakefront neighborhood zombie seems like a great deal, with its massive swimming pool and vintage floors. But with an unexpected roof replacement, their huge payday may just drown in the deep end.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael teams up with her friend Dr. Will Li, an author and medical scientist whose work focuses on eating for well-being. Together, they prepare a meal of grilled sea bass and sautéed baby bok choy.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)

programme.title: Neighbourhood Watch (S1)
programme.desc: From bad ideas to carelessness and just plain not thinking, all our neighbours' fails, fiascos, and face palms are immortalised on camera.

programme.title: Neighbourhood Watch (S1)
programme.desc: Ideas that seemed good at the time. Practical jokes with unexpected results. Best intentions gone awry. Not everything turns out as expected.

programme.title: Mini Reni (S1)
programme.desc: Joanna heads to New York for a special renovation. She blends warm, neutral colours to design a new office for Hoda Kotb with a fresh, modern feel.

programme.title: Small Spaces
programme.desc: Join James Koh as he meets with inspiring individuals across Asia who have discovered ingenious hacks to expand tiny living areas.

programme.title: Renovation Wild (S1)
programme.desc: With only a month left before guests arrive, Grant and Lynsey begin their next renovation on the Family Suite at Old Mondoro and Tent Seven at Chiawa camp.

programme.title: Renovation Wild (S1)
programme.desc: Grant and Lynsey still have to tackle the Safari Suite at Chiawa Camp in their final push to opening day. They have very little time left to pull it off.

programme.title: Bargain Block (S2)
programme.desc: Keith and Evan work with minimalism in a rundown bungalow while letting loose with pink decor in the Modern Dollhouse.

programme.title: Manoy: Isang Pagsaludo Kay Eddie Garcia
programme.desc: Icons of Philippine entertainment industry pay tribute to the “Manoy” of Philippine Cinema Eddie Garcia in this documentary helmed by internationally-acclaimed director, Jon Red.

programme.title: Hayup sa Sex Appeal
programme.desc: Diosa, an attractive young lady who came from the town’s most prominent family. She was given two new bodyguards, former assasins. Soon enough, they perform their evil plan.

programme.title: Alipin ng Aliw
programme.desc: They are the women of the night.Their bodies gyrate, their skins exposed just when the rest of their kind are safely tucked under soft sheets.

programme.title: Binhi
programme.desc: Daniel (Joem Bascon) and Cynthia (Mercedes Cabral), a young couple with a child on the way, head back to Baguio to start over again. Everything seems to be falling into place for them - or so they think - until strange things start to happen in their house.

programme.title: Bitay Lethal Injection
programme.desc: A group of bad boys are terrorizing the campus scene with several students found raped and murdered. Brenda (Amalia Jones) survives and her policeman-boyfriend does his best to find the criminals.

programme.title: Trophy Wife
programme.desc: Lani (Cristine Reyes) draws Chino (Derek Ramsay), his brother, Sammy (John Estrada), and his girlfriend Gwen (Heart Evangelista) into a complex game of revenge. Will it be too late before one of the men reveals his dark side?

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Elevator
programme.desc: Trapped inside the elevator of a hotel casino complex, an elevator boy falls in love with his investor's girlfriend that forces him to choose between his love for her, or his dreams for a better future.

programme.title: Jeannie, Bakit Ngayon ka Lang
programme.desc: A story of an ill-fated OFW whose hopes are once more afloat by a genie..the one that he’s been waiting forever.

programme.title: In Your Eyes
programme.desc: This is a love triangle involving two sisters who fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: ABNKKBSNPLAko? The movie
programme.desc: The film follows the life of the character named Roberto Ong (Jericho Rosales). It checks the four phases of his life. From childhood memories, his best times in high school, his years in college and until his life as an working adult.

programme.title: Fangirl Fanboy
programme.desc: It tells the story of a wannabe actor and a talented teleserye dubber who agrees to help him improve his acting. Her coaching helps him achieve his dream of becoming a star only to find herself heartbroken when he becomes successful.

programme.title: Biyaheng Langit
programme.desc: After Bea (Joyce Jimenez) loses her money in the casino, she tries desperately to regain her capital by trying her luck in gambling and using her car as collateral. Danny (Mark Anthony) is the liaison between the gambling lord and the collector at the casino.

programme.title: Death of a Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Christine was found brutally killed in the woods, her boyfriend, a forest ranger and a farmer are summoned for inquest. Each has a version to tell.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: The history books say Adolf Hitler committed suicide in the final days of World War II, but not everyone believes there's sufficient proof. Did the Nazi leader die in Berlin, or was he able to escape?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle—and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes with Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3)
programme.desc: The clock is ticking with only days remaining in python season. Pickle seeks validation from Troy on her tracking skills. Bruce must hunt alone in Zak's absence.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes with Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's the unsolved air piracy case in history. A man hijacks a Northwest Orient Airlines flight, demanding 4 parachutes and $200,000. He jumps off the plane with the money and is never seen again.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle—and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth?

programme.desc: The clock is ticking with only days remaining in python season. Pickle seeks validation from Troy on her tracking skills. Bruce must hunt alone in Zak's absence.

programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle—and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth?

programme.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. In this episode, we explore the stories behind these lost sites and the endeavours to find them.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified with David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: Forget the moon or the stars—every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal to Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li’s wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li’s Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother’s death – a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.

programme.title: The Moon Thieves
programme.desc: A crooked watch dealer assembles a daring crew - a thief, an explosive expert, a lock breaker and a watch connoisseur - to steal three luxury watches in Tokyo. Their mission takes an unexpected turn when they discover the legendary 'Moonwatch.' Pursued by the yakuza, the team must unite to navigate the chaos and pull off their high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Legend of the Fox
programme.desc: A young man, Chin, believes he is an orphan, until he meets three men and learns from them that his father was a great swordsman who was killed when he was trying to dispel rumors of a wrongdoing and return a lost sword to its rightful owner. Chin seeks out the men’s help to take vengeance on the wrongful death of his father.

programme.title: Ready O/R Knot
programme.desc: Guy and Heidi have been together for five years since they first met in a wedding banquet, but marriage soon becomes a challenge to their relationship. Heidi sees marriage as a testimony of their love, while Guy sees it as doomsday. Can the couple resolve their conflict? Are they ready or not?

programme.title: Rendezvous with Death
programme.desc: Sun Chung had been recognized as an expert comedy and crime thriller director, but he was to gain even greater acclaim for his soulful, powerful, intelligent, and beautifully-made martial arts epics. This stands alongside The Deadly Breaking Sword and The Kung-fu Instructor as one of his very best. It's not so much the plot - a master swordsman protects a treasure chest on a dangerous journey - that makes this great, but what Sun does with it, inspiring the cast and crew to some of their finest work.

programme.title: Crippled Avengers
programme.desc: Chu Twin becomes crazy after his son’s arms were chopped off. For no reason, he harms four people causing them various disabilities. The four disabled form a band to learn Kung Fu from a master, in order to take revenge on Chu Twin.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Wolf Pack squad led by Lao Diao, is a foreign-based team that specializes in overseas security jobs. In one of the missions, the squad discovers that a terrorist force is planning to destroy the country’s energy source. Lao Diao is now entrusted with the task of leading his squad to fight back. Can the Wolf Pack save the day?

programme.title: Vital Signs
programme.desc: Paramedic Wang partners with Ma after being reassigned to a new station. Initially, Wang disagrees with Ma’s unconventional methods, but over time, Ma helps him rediscover the true mission of a paramedic - saving every life.

programme.title: Table for Six 2
programme.desc: The sequel to "Table for Six", Bernard and Lung plan to get married while their eldest brother is away. Yet, the weddings spiral into a chaotic battleground with escalating family drama, creating a messy affair for everyone involved.

programme.title: Na Cha the Great
programme.desc: Adapted from a chapter of the classic Chinese legend “Investiture of the Gods”, this is the story of Na Cha set 3000 years ago. After Na Cha sacrificed his life to save his parents, he is reincarnated with his spirit embodied in a lotus flower and is armed with two magic weapons to save the people from their despotic emperor.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Everything is Unknown
programme.desc: Pan Yi Ming receives his father's will stating that he must attend his funeral at home to claim the huge inheritance. When he returns home, he encounters his ex-girlfriend, her husband Hua Qi and his daughter whom he has never met. When Pan discovers that his daughter is being abused by Hua, he vows to save her but eventually fall into their trap…

programme.title: I Did It my Way
programme.desc: As the secretive, complex world of online drug trafficking increasingly targets Hong Kong, the police launches a risky and top-secret sting operation to bring down one of the most notorious drug lords in Asia.

programme.title: Fong Sai-Yuk, Return of Heroes
programme.desc: After Fong Sai-Yuk’s adoptive father is murdered by traitors of the Red Flower Society, he vows to hunt them down and avenge his death. Driven by grief and loyalty, he rises against the conspirators in a ruthless fight for justice.

programme.title: The Rescue
programme.desc: An emergency occurs on an offshore drilling rig that would cause it to capsize and sink. The Emergency Response Unit races against the clock in a chopper rescue mission amidst dangerous explosions and fire. Captain Gao Qian must work seamlessly with his chopper pilot Zhao Cheng to rescue survivors using the most maverick and dangerous tactics.

programme.title: Topo-Topo Barega
programme.desc: Topo Topo Barega, an expression meaning "All for one, One for all." What each earns individually becomes the money of all. The problem of one worries the rest.

programme.title: Reputasyon
programme.desc: What a nice schoolgirl like Miya Brown (Mia Nolasco) doing in a club as G.R.O.? She has learned that there is life beyond her mother's world and that of her father's.

programme.title: Grease Gun Gang
programme.desc: A renewed ex-convict (Robin Padilla) decided to change his friends’ lifestyle after he came out of the jail.

programme.title: Burlesk Queen
programme.desc: One of the classics of Philippine cinema wherein screen ingenue Vilma Santos made her transition into matured actress. Into this world came the young girl who becomes its last shining star. But as her presence brought life into the old art, her own existence is endangered by the decaying surroundings.

programme.title: Ang Lahat ng ito pati na ang Langit
programme.desc: Movie Queen Susan Roces made a rare screen appearance as a famous dress designer, who adopted the illegitimate daughter of one of her models, Dina Bonnevie. The little girl became her only joy after she turned into a recluse when she lost her fiancé to the same seemingly unstable Dina.

programme.title: Masamang Damo
programme.desc: When Joko Diaz placed his family in danger after getting into an imbroglio with fellow slumboys, he wisely contrived a plan.

programme.title: Mauna Ka... Susunod Ako!
programme.desc: When Gerry's father Eric dies in the hands of criminal elements, he goes to his father's bestfriend Arthur for guidance.

programme.title: Row 4, the Baliktorians
programme.desc: Aruy (Dennis Padilla) and Aguy (Andrew E), heirs to a 10 million fortune, on a condition that they'll able to graduate. If not, the money would go to the school with so much at stake.

programme.title: Si Maryo O Si Goko
programme.desc: Loony William Martinez stars as your COMPU-WHACKO THRILL-SEEKER who entered into a series of hell-raising misadventures that will take the viewers to the outskirts of computer-generated fantasia.

programme.title: Bondying (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Jimmy Santos took on the role of one of the country's most beloved komik characters. Bondying, whose name has come to mean somebody immature or who never grew passed childhood.

programme.title: Takas sa Impiyerno
programme.desc: Hell is what the residents call their town. It is because Mayor Sebastian (Paquito Diaz) virtually sees the town as his own personal kingdom.

programme.title: Hiram na Mukha
programme.desc: Famous plastic surgeon Dr. Hugo (Christopher de Leon) worships the ground his fiancee Alicia (Nanette Medved) walks on. That is because he feels Alicia is his creation.

programme.title: Nananabik
programme.desc: Newlywed Dan (Ricky Belmonte) goes on an overseas trip where he becomes unwittingly involved with a crime syndicate. Meanwhile, with no word from him, his wife Nerissa (Didith Reyes) goes back to her old job and acquires herself a new boyfriend to fulfill her needs. What will happen when Dan finally comes back?

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park. // Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Daring Danny wants a cool pet of his own, so he can't believe his luck when a stray baby hippo finds him.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: Dora

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: Early on Sunday morning, Detective Tanisha Sykes Smith responds to a man found deceased from multiple gunshot wounds alongside a building in the Lower 9th Ward.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Stephen Hough got away with raping and killing 16-year-old Janet Cummings. He fabricated an alibi for his crimes and let an innocent man go to jail. Four decades later, detectives made a breakthrough.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a senior citizen wields an unusual weapon—her mouth; a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive-thru; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: Tulsa police find a woman beaten to death during a welfare check, and a son witnesses his father's murder while renovating a house.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn. The investigation into her death takes her family on a harrowing journey.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When Linda Slaten is brutally strangled in her Lakeland, FL, home, a web of suspects emerges. The case takes a dramatic turn when a DNA hit exposes the sinister underbelly of this peaceful community.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A fugitive shows up to the courthouse but changes his mind and flees from officers; an assault victim confronts her attacker in court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused murderer escapes from the courthouse; a teenager goes on trial for robbing a 9-year-old selling Girl Scout cookies; and more.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a beloved rapper is gunned down in a hail of bullets from a drive-by shooting. With little hard evidence, detectives and prosecutors need to rely on a tipster to testify.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S3)
programme.desc: A young man stabs another man who assaulted his brother and attempted to steal from their family-run petrol station. Was it attempted murder or self defence?

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After an immigrant, lured by a woman, is beaten to death, Gwinnett County Police discover that one of the three suspects believes no one will care about him because he's Mexican.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S3)
programme.desc: A young man stabs another man who assaulted his brother and attempted to steal from their family-run petrol station. Was it attempted murder or self defence?

programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. programme.desc: Learn about the process of planning, setting up, running a small business, and entrepreneurial skills.

programme.title: Meurtres A Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. And it is his daughter, Marion, who heads the case, alongside Antoine. What links the murders? Suspicions begin to grow about the way the first case was handled.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou
programme.desc: Pokou sets off for another challenge. Together, she and Yiblo fight a monster that destroys everything in its way.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier Anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'Afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: In gastronomy, a belief persists: to become a great chef, you must suffer. A rule that justifies moral, sometimes physical, violence and all kinds of humiliations. We investigated behind the scenes of Michelin-starred restaurants-a highly competitive world where every blow seems allowed.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Laissez-Vous Guider
programme.desc: Stephane Bern and LorAnt Deutsch let their love of history and heritage do the talking. Anecdotes, revelations, little known stories, architecture... Let yourself be guide

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Bordered by the East Sea and neighboring China, Laos and Cambodia, Vietnam is a fascinating country where tradition and modernity blend harmoniously. Despite its colonial past and conflicts, it has risen to become one of Asia's most dynamic economies while preserving a strong cultural identity.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Alex Hugo
programme.desc: Lusagne's police call on a building renovation organisation. At the end of the day, two members of the team have gone missing. Alex discovers the lifeless body of one with a serious head wound. The second, recently released after a long prison sentence, is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or "Say Lay", instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte, and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Henry’s mom has her purse stolen, Captain Man decides he should move in with Henry’s family in order to protect them. Soon, Captain Man takes on a fatherly role which becomes more than Henry likes.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When Chapa's little sister needs her help during a city-wide blackout, the rest of Danger Force cross the line as they try to pull her back to power up the Man's Nest and help them win a contest.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Victorious

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?
